title: Stir-Fried Sausage with Kabanos
description: A quick and savory Japanese-inspired dish featuring stir-fried sausage and crispy kabanos.
instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the Japanese sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Remove the sausage from the skillet and set aside.
4. Add the sliced kabanos to the skillet and cook until crispy, about 2-3 minutes.
5. Add the chopped kimchi, sliced aji amarillo peppers, and cooked sausage back into the skillet.
6. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the kimchi is slightly caramelized.
7. Stir in the crispy tempura bits and cook for 1 minute.
8. Season with soy sauce and cook for an additional minute.
9. Garnish with chopped green onions and serve immediately.
10. Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
